app.name: daydaynote
root.short: daydaynote is a small CLI app built with Cobra
root.long: daydaynote is a small CLI app built with Cobra. Put each command in cmd/ for easy maintenance.
cmd.list.short: Show records for a specific date
cmd.delete.short: Delete a record from a specific date
cmd.edit.short: Edit a record from a specific date
cmd.help.long:
Help provides help for any command in the application.
Simply type %s help [command path] for full details.
cmd.completion.short: Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
err.date.invalid: invalid date: %s, use yyyy/m/d or yyyy-m-d
err.index.invalid: invalid index: %s, enter an integer greater than 0
flag.date: Specify date in yyyy/m/d or yyyy-m-d
help.more_information: Use "{{.CommandPath}} [command] --help" for more information about a command.
